extortion.description: [AI generated] Bazco Oil Company, based in Michigan, USA, is a leader in petroleum and gasoline distribution. They supply fuels, oils, and lubricants to various businesses such as automotive, industrial, commercial, construction, and more. The company is committed to providing high-quality products and customer service, focusing on safety, reliability, and efficiency. Further, Bazco Oil operates several gas stations and convenience stores across the region.
